items.text: Google released Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, a security-tuned model for finding and patching software vulnerabilities, available only to governments and trusted partners via a limited-access pilot.
items.text_zh: 谷歌发布安全特化模型 Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber，专用于发现、验证并修补软件漏洞，通过限量试点仅向政府及可信合作伙伴开放。

items.text: Google is reportedly developing 'Frozen v2', a chip hardwiring Gemini's architecture into silicon that engineers project could be six to ten times more efficient than current TPUs.
items.text_zh: 据报道，谷歌正研发代号"Frozen v2"的芯片，将 Gemini 架构直接固化进硅片，工程师预计推理能效可达现有 TPU 的 6 到 10 倍。

items.text: Jack Dorsey's Block launched Buzz, a free open-source workspace built on Nostr where AI agents hold their own cryptographic identities and collaborate as full members alongside humans.
items.text_zh: Jack Dorsey 旗下 Block 发布 Buzz——基于 Nostr 协议的免费开源协作平台，AI Agent 拥有独立加密身份，与人类以平等成员身份协同工作。

items.text: Tesla expanded its unsupervised robotaxi service to Orlando and Tampa on July 21, one day before its second-quarter earnings report.
items.text_zh: 特斯拉 7 月 21 日将无安全员 Robotaxi 服务扩展至奥兰多和坦帕两市，恰在二季度财报发布前一天。

items.text: Substack launched an AI-detection feature powered by Pangram, letting readers scan posts over 100 words for an estimate of how much was written with AI.
items.text_zh: Substack 上线由 Pangram 驱动的 AI 检测功能，读者可对超过 100 词的文章进行扫描，估算其中 AI 写作的占比。

items.text: Meta says its AI moderation systems make 13% fewer errors than human reviewers while catching 10% more violations, as it cuts review staff despite employee warnings.
items.text_zh: Meta 称其 AI 内容审核系统比人工审核错误率低 13%、多发现 10% 的违规内容，同时正削减人工审核团队，内部员工警告推进过快。

items.text: The European Commission published guidelines on July 21 to help AI providers and deployers meet the AI Act's transparency obligations taking effect August 2, 2026.
items.text_zh: 欧盟委员会 7 月 21 日发布指南，帮助 AI 提供方与部署方履行《AI 法案》透明度义务，相关规定将于 2026 年 8 月 2 日生效。

items.text: Epoch AI found leading detectors miss roughly one in five AI texts imitating a specific author's style, with miss rates reaching 48% on scientific writing.
items.text_zh: Epoch AI 研究发现，主流 AI 检测器对模仿特定作者文风的 AI 文本漏检率约达五分之一，科研写作类漏检率最高达 48%。

items.text: Anduril and Archer Aviation unveiled Thunder, a jointly developed autonomous hybrid-electric VTOL attack rotorcraft, sending Archer's stock up about 20%.
items.text_zh: Anduril 与 Archer Aviation 联合发布自主混电垂直起降攻击旋翼机"Thunder"，消息推动 Archer 股价大涨约 20%。

items.text: Director Neill Blomkamp released 'Nightborne', a 13-minute sci-fi short generated with ByteDance's Seedance 2.0, and said he plans a full-length feature in the same format.
items.text_zh: 导演 Neill Blomkamp 发布 13 分钟科幻短片《Nightborne》，画面全部由字节跳动 Seedance 2.0 生成，并称计划以同样方式制作一部长片。

items.text: Inference platform Fireworks AI raised a $1.5 billion Series D at a $17.5 billion valuation as its annualized revenue crossed $1 billion.
items.text_zh: 推理平台 Fireworks AI 完成 15 亿美元 D 轮融资，估值达 175 亿美元，其年化收入已突破 10 亿美元。

items.text: Alibaba led a Series C round for Beijing video-generation startup AIsphere, lifting the round to 2.98 billion yuan ($439 million) amid China's world-model investment race.
items.text_zh: 阿里巴巴领投北京视频生成创企爱诗科技（AIsphere）C 轮融资，该轮累计达 29.8 亿元人民币（约 4.39 亿美元），中国世界模型投资竞赛升温。

items.text: xAI launched Grok Automations, letting users schedule recurring tasks or trigger them from incoming email, with email triggers reserved for SuperGrok subscribers.
items.text_zh: xAI 推出 Grok Automations 功能，用户可设定定时任务或由收到的邮件触发自动执行，邮件触发功能仅限 SuperGrok 订阅用户。
